name_en: Top-tier replica M24261 Cream This Speedy Bandouliere 20 bag is made of soft lambskin leather in a subtle tone, with a contrasting Malletage diamond quilt pattern to enhance the visual effect. The Toron handle and detachable chain leather shoulder strap expand carrying options, while the metal lock and double zipper closure add functional details. Dimensions: 20.5 × 13.5 × 12 cm
